case_title: LE YEN PHUNG VS. PETER HUYNH

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF PHUNG, LE YEN AS TO DEFENDANT HUYNH, PETER AN INDIVIDUAL AND GENERAL PARTNER OF VIETNAM, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PHUNG, LE YEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUYNH, PETER AN INDIVIDUAL AND GENERAL PARTNER OF VIETNAM, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP $95,202.24 PRINCIPAL, $2,650.30 INTEREST, $450.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $98,302.54, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
